hero.title: Beauty that breathes through time
hero.subtitle: A refined space of care in Quinta da Bicuda, where every gesture is designed to reveal your essence.

philosophy.title: Where care meets art.
philosophy.quote: We believe true beauty lives in attention to small details — touch, time, listening.
philosophy.body: In the heart of Cascais, Chi Sublime is more than a salon. It's a sensorial refuge where every visit celebrates your individuality.

services.title: Five universes of care.
services.description: From exceptional hair treatments to bridal makeup and brow design — each service is delivered with the precision of those who treat each client as unique.

team.title: Hands that care.
team.description: Three professionals. One shared passion for the art of beauty.

contact.title: We're waiting for you.
contact.description: In the heart of Quinta da Bicuda, in a space designed in detail to welcome those seeking more than a service — an experience.
